title: Versions & Deployments
excerpt: description: Upload versions of Workers and create deployments to release new versions. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Versions track changes to your Worker. Deployments configure how those changes are deployed to your traffic. You can upload changes (versions) to your Worker independent of changing the version that is actively serving traffic (deployment).
